---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a feature or change for abcpwn
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: manop55555
---

## Problem
What problem does this solve? Include a concrete example of the workflow
this would change.

## Proposal
Sketch of the proposed interface, output, or behavior.

## Alternatives considered
What other approaches were considered and why this proposal is preferred.

## Scope
Does this fit within an existing subcommand (which one?), or is it a new
subcommand?

## Out of scope
Anything related but explicitly NOT being proposed here.
